html:
Exclusive to:

This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.

The Halberd is a Melee Weapon exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It can be crafted in the Fight Tab using 1 Alloy and 2 Twigs. The Halberd can also be used as an Axe to chop Trees.

Halberds have a 100% chance to drop from Royal Guards, found in Pig Cities. They can also be bought from The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop for 5 Oincs. There is a 16.67% chance to spawn a single Halberd in the Secret Bandit Camp.

Usage

“Now I can't be caught off-guard.”
–Wilson
“Weapons are only good if they're twice your size.”
–Willow
“Sword is for weak no-muscle men.”
–Wolfgang

“AN EVIL KILLING IMPLEMENT”
–WX-78

–Wickerbottom
“Well, it's no axe.”
–Woodie
“A blade as sharp as my wit.”
–Maxwell

–Wagstaff

–Walani

–Woodlegs

–Wormwood
“The must-have multi-tool for adventurers.”
–Wheeler
The Halberd is a Melee Weapon exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It can be crafted in the Fight Tab using 1 Alloy and 2 Twigs. The Halberd can also be used as an Axe to chop Trees.
Halberds have a 100% chance to drop from Royal Guards, found in Pig Cities. They can also be bought from The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop for 5 Oincs. There is a 16.67% chance to spawn a single Halberd in the Secret Bandit Camp.

The '''Halberd '''is a [[Weapon#Melee_weapons|Melee Weapon]] exclusive to the ''[[Hamlet]] '' DLC. It can be crafted in the [[Fight Tab]] using 1 [[Alloy]] and 2 [[Twigs]]. The Halberd can also be used as an [[Axe]] to chop [[Tree]]s.

Halberds have a 100% chance to drop from [[Royal Guard]]s, found in [[Pig City|Pig Cities]]. They can also be bought from [[Pig Shops|The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop]] for 5 [[Oinc]]s. There is a 16.67% chance to spawn a single Halberd in the [[Secret Bandit Camp]].
